//: CORE MCP servers, reached over STATEFUL Streamable-HTTP at :8000/mcp (NOT legacy SSE). mcpo reads the `type` key (not `transport`); `type: streamable-http` -> mcpo's streamablehttp_client. The stdio `command`/`args` are kept for documentation of the underlying server but are unused when `url`+`type` are present. See compose/ai-ml/mcp-servers/mcp-servers.yml for the root-cause (single-Protocol SSE crash) this transport avoids.
//scope: Only the 4 core-profile servers are listed. The tools-profile servers (fetch/surrealdb/docker) are intentionally OMITTED: mcpo connects to every server in this file at startup, and an unreachable server's Streamable-HTTP cleanup raises an anyio cancel-scope error that CASCADE-CANCELS sibling connections (it was killing github+postgres). surrealdb/docker are also 404 on npm (dead packages). Re-add a server here only once it is actually deployed and validated.

filesystem.description: Read/write files in the agent workspace

memory.description: Persistent key-value entity memory across sessions

github.description: Read repos, issues, PRs, and files from GitHub

postgres.description: SQL queries against all Postgres databases
